headline: Citi Raises its Price Target on NXP Semiconductors (NXPI)
summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) is one of the 15 Best AI Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years. On June 23, 2026, Citi raised its price target on NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) to $370 from $270 and kept a Buy rating. Citi cited June analog price increases and its view that AI data […]

headline: What Analog Devices Stock Was Saying By Intentionally Selling Less
summary: Before the chipmaker's stock surged, management was telling anyone who would listen that they were deliberately holding back sales in their biggest market.
